item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n15","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant correctly treated this as a legal convergence iteration: three prior changes improved attendance from 70% to 82%, and the new request continues the same optimization path toward 85%.
